LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter1Site.label: cryptoforge scanning site
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter1Site.description: An ancient scanning site used to locate the Cryptoforge.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter2Site.label: cryptoforge stern wreckage
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter2Site.description: The crash site of the Cryptoforge stern, containing the ship's black box.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter3Site.label: cryptoforge bow wreckage
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter3Site.description: The crash site of the Cryptoforge bow, containing the ship's black box.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter4Site.label: legendary cryptoforge
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter4Site.description: The crash site of the legendary cryptoforge, an ancient ultratech workshop.
